title: Don't hit me
description: Allows the player to decide which entities they can hit. Works both  in singleplayer and multiplayer
body:
This mod allows players to choose exactly which entities they can attack.

In the mod menu, you can toggle any mob on or off and decide whether you want to be able to hit it. This gives you full control over your attacks and helps prevent accidental damage. For example, it could save your next Mending villager from being eliminated with a single crit.

With customizable settings, you can protect valuable or passive mobs while still being able to fight hostile ones, making gameplay safer and more convenient.
